data.title: Diginex appoints Lorenzo Romano as Deputy Chairman to capitalize on growing sustainability RegTech market, projected to reach $80 billion by 2032.
data.description: In London on December 11, 2025, Diginex Limited (NASDAQ: DGNX), a prominent provider of Sustainability RegTech and Data Management solutions, revealed the appointment of Lorenzo Romano as Deputy Chairman. This move aims to enhance Diginex's governance structure and equip the company to benefit from the fast-growing global sustainability RegTech industry. The market, anticipated to surge from around $20 billion in 2025 to more than $80 billion by 2032, is being fueled by increasing ESG regulations and the need for sophisticated compliance technologies.

data.title: The Honest Company (NASDAQ: HNST) will participate in Northland Growth Conference 2025 on December 16, 2025.
data.description: Los Angeles, on December 11, 2025 - The Honest Company, a company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol HNST, known for its commitment to producing environmentally-friendly personal care items, revealed that CEO Carla Vernón, CFO Curtiss Bruce, and Head of Investor Relations Elizabeth Bouquard will engage in discussions with investors during an upcoming conference.

data.title: Use tax-free FSA funds for travel essentials to avoid losing funds by Dec 31 deadline. Millions traveling this holiday season.
data.description: Taking advantage of Flexible Spending Account (FSA) funds for buying travel necessities presents an ideal strategy to prevent losing money due to the December 31 deadline. As of December 11, 2025, this opportunity emerges for millions of Americans who will embark on journeys by air and roadways throughout the nation. By utilizing this option, individuals can make the most of their FSA funds and ensure they are not forfeited before the deadline, contributing to a smoother and more financially efficient travel experience.

data.title: Oracle Corp. posted $16.06 billion revenue in Q2 2026, missing estimates. Adjusted earnings were $2.26/share, up 54%. Analysts cut forecasts.
data.description: Oracle Corporation, trading on NYSE under the ticker ORCL, released its second-quarter financial results for fiscal 2026 following Wednesday's market closure. The company documented a revenue figure of $16.06 billion for the quarter, falling short of the predicted $16.21 billion by analysts. On the other hand, Oracle declared a 54% increase in adjusted earnings, amounting to $2.26 per share, surpassing the anticipated $1.64 per share. The software giant emphasized its commitment to Cloud Neutrality, advocating for customers' freedom to operate Oracle databases across any cloud platform of their preference. This approach has proven fruitful, with their Multicloud database segment experiencing rapid growth. For the detailed story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bitcoin treasuries' growth halts in Q4, yet top holders persist in accumulating sats. Public companies now own over 4.7% of total BTC supply.
data.description: The uptake of Bitcoin by company treasuries experienced a decrease in the last quarter, yet significant firms persist in acquiring BTC, leading to public companies collectively holding more than 4.7% of the entire Bitcoin supply.

data.title: Sands China, volunteers assemble 30,000 hygiene kits for 'Clean the World' initiative. 345 tons recycled since 2014.
data.description: Since 2014, Sands China, in collaboration with community partners like the University of Saint Joseph, sustainability nonprofit Sustaincia, and Oxfam in Macau, has successfully recycled 345 tons of hotel amenities. This initiative involved the participation of 330 team members and volunteers. The project aims to promote sustainability and responsible waste management practices in the region.
BRUSSELS - GERMAN FINANCE MINISTER KLINGBEIL SAYS GERMANY WILL SUPPORT GREEK FINANCE MINISTER KYRIAKOS PIERRAKAKIS AS EUROGROUP PRESIDENT

data.title: Mingzhu Logistics gets Nasdaq delisting notice, plans to appeal. Securities to be delisted from Nasdaq on Dec. 12, 2025.
data.description: Shenzhen, China, on December 11, 2025- Mingzhu Logistics Holdings Limited, a company registered in the Cayman Islands, shared news today about a notification received from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC on December 10, 2025. The notice mentioned the delisting of the Company's securities from the Nasdaq Capital Market, with trading to halt starting December 12, 2025.

data.title: martini.ai introduces Voice Typing for Credit Risk Analysis, enhancing analyst efficiency with real-time data.
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, martini.ai Voice Typing, developed by Rajiv Bhat, is making waves as the industry's inaugural voice dictation tool catering to credit analysis. This innovative tool is revolutionizing the way analysts engage with intricate financial data.

data.title: Udemy partners with Workera to offer integrated skills intelligence, enhancing workforce capabilities. #AI #skillverification
data.description: In San Francisco, Udemy (Nasdaq: UDMY), a global AI-driven skills acceleration platform, has disclosed a key collaboration with Workera, a top AI-powered skills validation platform. This partnership aims to offer organizations a cohesive, data-centric approach to assess workforce capabilities, pinpoint skill deficiencies, and showcase the efficacy of large-scale focused learning initiatives. Through this partnership, Workera's skills assessments will be integrated, yielding a comprehensive solution for companies.

data.title: Mobi appoints industry veteran as Chief Revenue Officer to drive AI-powered travel retail.
data.description: A seasoned industry professional has been appointed as the Chief Revenue Officer by Mobi in Boston. This move is aimed at driving forward their AI-powered travel retail initiatives. This strategic decision is expected to boost revenue and enhance the company's position in the market.

data.title: Imperial Petroleum Inc. releases Q3 & 9M 2025 financial & operating results. Symbol: IMPP. Headquartered in Athens, Greece.
data.description: Athens, Greece - On December 11, 2025, Imperial Petroleum Inc. (NASDAQ: IMPP) revealed its unaudited financial data and operational performance for the third quarter and nine months concluding on September 30, 2025. This company, involved in owning ships and offering services related to petroleum products, crude oil, and dry bulk seaborne transportation, shared the updates.

data.title: Scientific Games partners with Arkansas Scholarship Lottery for eight years to enhance digital loyalty program, drive education proceeds.
data.description: Arkansas residents will now enjoy enhanced benefits through a revamped digital loyalty program, thanks to a recent agreement between Scientific Games and the Arkansas Lottery office. The new eight-year partnership will bring significant improvements to the Scientific Games Enhanced Partnership instant game management program. This collaboration aims to provide players with an enriched gaming experience and increased rewards. The agreement promises to boost player engagement and satisfaction levels in Arkansas over the next eight years.

data.title: Celebrate the holidays stress-free with Crémant d'Alsace, a festive French sparkler perfect for casual gatherings.
data.description: In Colmar, France on December 11, 2025, an alternative way to celebrate the holidays is being suggested. Rather than organizing elaborate dinners with meticulous table settings, the focus is shifting towards more laid-back and enjoyable entertaining options. These can range from casual happy hours and potluck-style meals to gift swaps and intimate evenings with a small group of close friends. This new approach aims to reduce the stress associated with traditional holiday hosting and promote a more relaxing and enjoyable festive season for all.
WHO CHIEF: EARLY ESTIMATES INDICATE THAT CHILDHOOD MORTALITY COULD INCREASE FOR FIRST TIME THIS CENTURY AMID HEALTH FUNDING CUTS

data.title: Dr. Jeremy A. Scarlett named Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for advancing Interventional Pain Management.
data.description: In Sheboygan, Wisconsin on December 11, 2025, Dr. Jeremy A. Scarlett has been recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for his significant work in Advancing Interventional Pain Management. Dr. Scarlett is commended for his exceptional contributions in this field, highlighting his expertise and dedication to enhancing pain management techniques.

data.title: Dow fluctuates due to unexpected jobless claims; Oracle stocks drop on earnings. Stay updated with Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index showed fluctuations following unexpected weekly jobless claims. The stock of AI company Oracle experienced a significant drop in response to their earnings report. This comes amidst live coverage on the latest market happenings. The market reacted negatively to the surprise jobless claims data, impacting investor sentiment. The Dow turned lower due to these factors, reflecting uncertainty in the current economic climate. Overall, these events highlight the volatile nature of the market with important numbers to consider for future investments.
DISNEY SENDS CEASE-AND-DESIST LETTER TO GOOGLE - CNBC

data.title: In 2026, data and AI will transform health industry; SAS predicts changes in discovery, treatment, and delivery care.
data.description: SAS has forecasted that data and AI will significantly impact the healthcare industry in the coming years. By 2026, the focus will be on a gradual, deliberate transformation rather than abrupt changes. This shift will revolutionize how healthcare and life sciences sectors approach discovery, treatment, and delivery of care. The prediction highlights the key role of AI and analytics in reshaping these sectors.

data.title: Broadview Group hires Hayden Medart as Associate to investment team; spent years at RW Baird & Co. in Tech & Services.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in St. Louis, Broadview Group welcomed Hayden Medart as the newest member of their investment team. Hayden comes on board as an Associate following significant experience in investment banking in the Technology & Services sector with RW Baird & Co. This addition reinforces Broadview's dedication to enhancing their team with top talent.
